name: CROSS_TOP_TARGETPAIRS_BY_ASSIGNEE_YEAR_RANGE
description: Top targetpairs by assignee in year range.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair), (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= $start_year AND y.year <= $end_year
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10;

examples: 某企业在2023-2025的Top target pairs是什么？
